本文的其余部分将介绍自定义选项，例如：

  • 斜杠命令选项
  • 配置在比赛中使用什么样的问题。
  • 自定义问题。
  • 游戏选项，例如点数、连胜奖金、游戏大厅大小限制以及回合期间和回合之间的时间。

要设置构建器，请从新的琐事斜杠命令开始。

 const { SlashCommandBuilder } = require ( ' @discordjs/builders ' ); const { TriviaManager } = require ( ' discord-trivia ' ); const trivia = new TriviaManager (); module . exports = { data : new SlashCommandBuilder () . setName ( ' Trivia ' ) . setDescription ( ' Lets play some trivia! ' ), async execute ( interaction ) { const game = trivia . createGame ( interaction ); game . start () . catch ( console . error ); }, };

需要TriviaCommandBuilder和TriviaManager

 const { TriviaManager , TriviaCommandBuilder } = require ( ' discord-trivia ' );

创建一个新实例并将其命名为command ，您可以将命令的名称和描述作为选项传递。

 const command = new TriviaCommandBuilder ({ name : ' trivia ' , description : ' Lets play some trivia! ' });

将您当前的module.exports.data替换为command.toBuilder()

 module . exports = { data : command . toBuilder (), async execute ( interaction ) { const game = trivia . createGame ( interaction ); game . start () . catch ( console . error ); }, };

最后，将command.getOptions(interaction)作为第二个参数传递给trivia.createGame()

 const game = trivia . createGame ( interaction , command . getOptions ( interaction ));

您的最终代码将如下所示：

 const { SlashCommandBuilder } = require ( ' @discordjs/builders ' ); const { TriviaManager , TriviaCommandBuilder } = require ( ' discord-trivia ' ); const trivia = new TriviaManager (); const command = new TriviaCommandBuilder ({ name : ' ping ' , description : ' Lets play some trivia! ' }); module . exports = { data : command . toBuilder (), async execute ( interaction ) { const game = trivia . createGame ( interaction , command . getOptions ( interaction )); game . start () . catch ( console . error ); }, };

这是您的机器人用户的结果：

任何选择的选项都将覆盖游戏的默认设置，而其余选项将保持原样。

通过代码定制

游戏问题

一个“免费使用，用户提供的琐事问题数据库”，它提供了数千个问题中的所有问题，包括 23 个琐事类别和 3 个难度。

要开始配置您的游戏，请创建一个名为gameOptions的变量作为对象。

要配置问题，我们需要覆盖questionData 。 例如，要以简单的难度接收10 个动漫和漫画问题，我们需要将gameOptions.questionData设置为：

 const gameOptions = { questionData : { amount : 10 , category : ' ENTERTAINMENT_JAPANESE_ANIME_AND_MANGA ' , difficulty : ' easy ' } };

要执行这些选项，请将它们作为第二个参数传递给trivia.createGame() ：

 const game = trivia . createGame ( interaction , gameOptions );

这些新选项将在您开始游戏时应用。

但是，如果您身边没有 OpenTDB 文档，就很难写下类别名称。 看看'ENTERTAINMENT_JAPANESE_ANIME_AND_MANGA'的大小！

让我们安装一个工具来帮助我们浏览 OpenTDB 类别， open-trivia-db 。

 npm install open-trivia-db

需要 open-trivia-db 中的Category类并输入Category.allNames. 现在选择一个类别作为gameOptions的选项

const gameOptions = { questionData : { category : Category . allNames . HISTORY } };

您和您的朋友提出的自定义问题将为您的游戏增添额外的个性！ 这是如何做到的：

创建一个名为myQuestions的数组，它将包含您的所有自定义问题。

此数组中的每个项目都是一个自定义问题。 自定义问题具有以下形状：

 { value: 'THE QUESTION' , correctAnswer: 'CORRECT ANSWER' , incorrectAnswers: [ 'INC ANS 1 ' , 'INC ANS 2 ' , 'INC ANS 3 ' ]
}

以下是 2 个自定义问题在myQuestions中的外观：

 const myQuestions = [ { value : ' Best Ice Cream Flavor? ' , correctAnswer : ' Shrimp ' , incorrectAnswers : [ ' Vanilla ' , ' Chocolate ' , ' Strawberry ' ] }, { value : ' Best Pizza Topping? ' , correctAnswer : ' Chicken Feet ' , incorrectAnswers : [ ' Pepperoni ' , ' Chicken ' , ' Sausage ' ] } ];

要制定您的自定义问题， myQuestions作为gameOptions.questionData传递

const gameOptions = { questionData : myQuestions }; const game = trivia . createGame ( interaction , gameOptions );

截至本文的最后一个修订版，您只能在自定义问题或 API 问题之间进行选择。 请继续关注更新！

游戏配置

您还可以使用其余的gameOptions自定义大厅限制、快速游戏的流程以及点数和连胜处理。

这是调整所有游戏配置以及每个选项更改的示例。

  • 例如，如果 Wumpus 连续 3 个问题并且设置为 20，那么他在该轮中的奖金将是 60。
  • 您可以通过要求TriviaGame并记录TriviaGame.defaults来查看默认值。

    经理定制

    最后，您可以通过TriviaManagerOptions自定义以下内容

    • 主题：此库中所有嵌入的颜色。
    • 您可以通过要求TriviaManager并记录TriviaManager.defaults来查看默认值。

      就是这样！ 如需支持和功能请求，请加入我们的 Discord 。 密切关注Discord Trivia Github Repo以获取更新和更改。



原文:

Trivia is often one of the most engaging group games to play, but programming a trivia match requires patience and a strong knowledge of programming.

Luckily, I have created an NPM module that implements fully fledged and polished trivia games straight out of the box with Discord.JS with just a few lines of code!

Github Repo., includes a condensed form of this article in the README.
NPM Page,
Discord Server

👉 What you will need to get started:

Getting Started

Open a terminal inside your Discord bot's root directory and install discord-trivia with the following command:

npm install discord-trivia

Then, create a new slash command file:

If you still use messages, Click here (support for messages is limited)

const { SlashCommandBuilder } = require('@discordjs/builders'); module.exports = { data: new SlashCommandBuilder() .setName('Trivia') .setDescription('Lets play some trivia!'), async execute(interaction) { },
};

At the top of your command file require the TriviaManager class from Discord Trivia. Create a new trivia manager instance and name it trivia.

const { TriviaManager } = require('discord-trivia');
const trivia = new TriviaManager();

Then, inside your execute() function create a new game using trivia.createGame(). Use game.start() to start a match as soon as this command is ran. Make sure to add a .catch() callback to catch any errors.

async execute(interaction) { // Create the game const game = trivia.createGame(interaction); // Start the game game .start() .catch(console.error);
},

Your code so far should look like this:

const { SlashCommandBuilder } = require('@discordjs/builders');
const { TriviaManager } = require('discord-trivia');
const trivia = new TriviaManager(); module.exports = { data: new SlashCommandBuilder() .setName('Trivia') .setDescription('Lets play some trivia!'), async execute(interaction) { const game = trivia.createGame(interaction); game .start() .catch(console.error); },
};

And that's all! Your bot will start a trivia match within the
channel the command was started 🎉🎉🎉

✨ Customization

The rest of this article will cover customization options such as:

  • Slash Command Options
  • Configuration of what kind of questions to use in a match.
  • Custom Questions.
  • Game options such as points, streak bonuses, game lobby size limits and time during and between rounds.

⭐ Customization Via Slash Command Options

Discord Trivia provides a TrivaCommandBuilder class to help you set up slash commands and provide and manage slash command options.

To setup the builder, start with a fresh trivia slash command.

const { SlashCommandBuilder } = require('@discordjs/builders');
const { TriviaManager } = require('discord-trivia');
const trivia = new TriviaManager(); module.exports = { data: new SlashCommandBuilder() .setName('Trivia') .setDescription('Lets play some trivia!'), async execute(interaction) { const game = trivia.createGame(interaction); game .start() .catch(console.error); },
};

Require TriviaCommandBuilder along side TriviaManager

const { TriviaManager, TriviaCommandBuilder } = require('discord-trivia');

Create a new instance and name it command, you can pass the command's name and description as options.

const command = new TriviaCommandBuilder({ name: 'trivia', description: 'Lets play some trivia!'
});

replace your current module.exports.data to command.toBuilder()

module.exports = { data: command.toBuilder(), async execute(interaction) { const game = trivia.createGame(interaction); game .start() .catch(console.error); },
};

and finally, pass command.getOptions(interaction) as the second parameter to trivia.createGame()

const game = trivia .createGame(interaction, command.getOptions(interaction));

Your final code will look like this:

const { SlashCommandBuilder } = require('@discordjs/builders');
const { TriviaManager, TriviaCommandBuilder } = require('discord-trivia'); const trivia = new TriviaManager(); const command = new TriviaCommandBuilder({ name: 'ping', description: 'Lets play some trivia!'
}); module.exports = { data: command.toBuilder(), async execute(interaction) { const game = trivia .createGame(interaction, command.getOptions(interaction)); game .start() .catch(console.error); },
};

And here is the result for your bot users:

Any chosen options will overwrite the game's defaults, while the remaining will stay as is.

Customization Via Code

Game Questions

Discord Trivia is powered by the Open Trivia Database API (OpenTDB). A "Free to use, user-contributed trivia question database" which supplies all of the questions in a selection of thousands of questions with 23 trivia categories and 3 difficulties.

To start configuring your game, create a variable named gameOptions as an object.

to configure the questions, we need to override the questionData. For example to recieve 10 Anime and Manga questions in easy difficulty we need to set gameOptions.questionData as such:

const gameOptions = { questionData: { amount: 10, category: 'ENTERTAINMENT_JAPANESE_ANIME_AND_MANGA', difficulty: 'easy' }
};

To enact these options, pass them as the 2nd parameter to trivia.createGame():

const game = trivia.createGame(interaction, gameOptions);

These new options will be applied when you start the game.

However, Without OpenTDB documentation right next to you it will be hard to write down category names. Just look at the size of 'ENTERTAINMENT_JAPANESE_ANIME_AND_MANGA'!

Let's install a tool to help us navigate the OpenTDB categories, open-trivia-db.

npm install open-trivia-db

require the Category class from open-trivia-db and type Category.allNames., notice how you now get a list of all 23 categories for OpenTDB at your fingertips!

const { Category } = require('open-trivia-db'); Category.allNames.

Now pick a category as an option for gameOptions

const gameOptions = { questionData: { category: Category.allNames.HISTORY }
};

⭐ Custom Questions

Custom questions by you and your friends will add extra personality to your game! Here's how to do it:

Create an array named myQuestions, this will hold all of your custom questions.

Each item in this array will be a custom question. A custom question has the following shape:

{ value: 'THE QUESTION', correctAnswer: 'CORRECT ANSWER', incorrectAnswers: ['INC ANS 1', 'INC ANS 2', 'INC ANS 3']
}

Here's how 2 custom question will look in myQuestions:

const myQuestions = [ { value: 'Best Ice Cream Flavor?', correctAnswer: 'Shrimp', incorrectAnswers: ['Vanilla', 'Chocolate', 'Strawberry'] }, { value: 'Best Pizza Topping?', correctAnswer: 'Chicken Feet', incorrectAnswers: ['Pepperoni', 'Chicken', 'Sausage'] }
];

To enact your custom questions, pass myQuestions as gameOptions.questionData

const gameOptions = { questionData: myQuestions
}; const game = trivia.createGame(interaction, gameOptions);

As of the last revision of this article, you can only choose between custom questions or API questions. Stay tuned for updates though!

Game configuration

You can also customize lobby restrictions, how your fast game flows and point and streak handling with the rest of gameOptions.

Here is an example of adjusting all game configurations and what each option changes.

  • minimumPlayerCount: Will not start a match unless the lobby size reaches this value.
  • maximumPlayerCount: Will only let this amount of players join.
  • queueTime: How long to wait for players before starting.
  • timePerQuestion, timeBetweenRounds are self explanatory.
  • minimumPoints, maximumPoints: The minimum and maximum amount of points a player can earn per correct answer.
  • pointsPerStreakAmount: This number multiplied by the streak number will be the bonus points awarded. For example, if Wumpus has a streak of 3 questions and this is set to 20, his bonus for that round will be 60.
  • maximumStreakBonus: The maximum amount of bonus points a streaking player can earn per round.
  • streakDefinitionLevel: The amount of questions needed to be answered correctly in a row for a streak to start. 
const gameOptions = { minimumPlayerCount: 5, maximumPlayerCount: 20, queueTime: 20_000, timePerQuestion: 15_000, timeBetweenRounds: 10_000, minimumPoints: 10, maximumPoints: 100, pointsPerStreakAmount: 20, maximumStreakBonus: 100, streakDefinitionLevel: 3
}

You can view the defaults by requiring TriviaGame and logging TriviaGame.defaults.

Manager Customization

Lastly, you can customize the following via your TriviaManagerOptions

  • theme: The color of all embeds from this library.
  • showAnswers: Whether or not the game should reveal the answer at the end of each round.
  • image: Am image is displayed in the initial embed for a queue, provide an image URL to override that image. 
const trivia = new TriviaManager({ theme: 'COLOR RESOLVABLE HERE', showAnswers: true / false, image: 'IMG URL'
});

You can view the defaults by requiring TriviaManager and logging TriviaManager.defaults.

And that's it! For support and feature requests Join Our Discord. Keep an eye on The Discord Trivia Github Repo for updates and changes.

item.title: 猫鼬以及如何按计数分组 | Mongoose and how to group by count
item.description:
佩雷·索拉

发表于这可能是一个不受欢迎的观点，但我不喜欢Mongoosejs 文档——我认为他们认为很多知识是理所当然的，而且他们的代码示例很差。 但也许是我：耸耸肩：

无论如何，我有一组文件，如下所示：

 [ { _id: 1, category: food, name: avocado }, { _id: 2, category: food, name: orange }, { _id: 3, category: drink, name: milk }, ]

我想创建一个返回如下数据的端点：g 

 data: { food: 2, drink: 1 }

基本上是类别的名称和文档的数量。 好吧，这让我踏上了跨越几个教程和其他一些 SO 线程的旅程。

免责声明：我可能应该更熟悉 MongoDB。 我曾经是，但就像生活中的许多事情一样，你忘记了它们，我还没有准备好再次使用 MongoDB 和 Mongoose。 我直接去了猫鼬。

首先，我发现使用 Mongoose 进行分组称为Aggregate 。 我找到Model.aggregate() ，它把我带到了本教程。 他们The $group Stage部分给了我一个适合我的解决方案。 但是返回的数据略有不同，没什么大不了的：

 data: [ { _id: "food", count: 2 }, { _id: "drink", count: 1 } ]

没什么大不了的，可能和它一样好，但我继续探索。 这让我想到了许多 SO 线程（没有那么多），主题略有不同，但它或多或少地转向了相同的语法。

然后，偶然地，我在这里发现了aggregate.sortByCount() ，它开箱即用！

或者至少这就是发生在我身上的事情。

我认为这对我来说已经足够好了，我将停止探索这个话题，希望这对你有用（：



原文:

Pere Sola

Posted on May 22

It may be an unpopular opinion but I don't like Mongoosejs docs - I think they take a lot of knowledge for granted and their code samples are poor. But maybe it's me :shrugs:

Anyway, I have a collection of documents that looks like:

[
     {
     _id: 1,
     category: food,
     name: avocado
     },
     {
     _id: 2,
     category: food,
     name: orange
     },
     {
     _id: 3,
     category: drink,
     name: milk
     },
]

I wanted to create an endpoint that returns data like: g

data: {
     food: 2,
     drink: 1
}

Basically the name of the category and the count of documents. Well, that brought me on a journey that span a couple of tutorials and some other SO thread.

Disclaimer: I should probably be more familiar with MongoDB. I used to be, but like many things in life, you forget them and I am not ready to ramp up with MongoDB again and also with Mongoose, again. I just went straight to Mongoose.

First, I discovered grouping with Mongoose is called Aggregate. I found Model.aggregate(), which brought me to this tutorial. Their The $group Stage section gave me a solution that worked for me. But data was returned slightly different, not a big deal:

data: [
     {
     _id: "food",
     count: 2
     },
     {
     _id: "drink",
     count: 1
     }
]

Not a big deal and probably as good as it gets, but I continued exploring. This brought me to a number of SO threads (there were not that many), slightly different topic but it revolved to more or less the same syntax.

And then, by chance, I discovered aggregate.sortByCount() here, which does the same out of the box!

sortByCount expects the name of the field and it does the whole $group, $count, etc for you. Or at least this is what happened for me.

I think this is good enough for me for now, I will stop exploring this topic, hope this was useful for you (:
item.author: petrussola

item.title: React18 中的 UseEffect | UseEffect in React18
item.description:
在本文中，我们将讨论为什么 useEffect 在 React18 中运行两次。 它会破坏您的代码还是会破坏您的代码以及如果它破坏了您的代码该怎么办。 它有什么帮助，如果有帮助，未来的路是什么。

所以你可能已经听说过它，因为它是反应宇宙中最热门的八卦，useEffects 现在将在开发时以严格模式运行两次。 具体来说，react 将模拟卸载和重新安装，即以前看起来像这样

* React mounts the component. * Layout effects are created. * Effects are created.

现在看起来像这样。

 * React mounts the component. * Layout effects are created. * Effects are created. * React simulates unmounting the component. * Layout effects are destroyed. * Effects are destroyed. * React simulates mounting the component with the previous state. * Layout effects are created. * Effects are created.

听到这个我们大多数人开始翻白眼，因为任何熟悉的人都无法直观地做出反应。 它确实引起了如此大的争议，以至于丹一度在推特上发了这条消息。

因此，让我们看看由于 useEffect 的这种行为而破坏的一些代码。

Cation: The code you are about to see is just for demonstration purpose only, motive here is to write simple explanatory piece of code that points to the main discussion.

 import " ./styles.css " ; import { useState , useEffect } from " react " ; export default function App () { const [ stopWatch , setStopwatch ] = useState ( 30 ); const [ intervalId , setIntervalId ] = useState ( 0 ); useEffect (() => { let id = setInterval (() => setStopwatch (( p ) => p - 1 ), 1000 ); setIntervalId ( id ); }, []); useEffect (() => { if ( stopWatch === 0 ) { clearInterval ( intervalId ); } }, [ stopWatch ]); return < div className = " App " > { stopWatch } < /div> ; }

所以这只是一个简单的片段，它试图启动一个反向计数器并计数到 0。在 react 17 中它会工作得很好，但是在这里检查一下这个计数器不会停止。

因此，让我们尝试确定出了什么问题。 我会把它分成几个步骤

  1. 组件模拟卸载。
  2. 现在 2 个区间同时更新计数。
  3. 当间隔被清除时，只有其中一个被清除，这就是它一直持续下去的原因。

到目前为止，您可能已经发现这是典型的内存泄漏案例，我们可以使用清理功能轻松修复它。 让我们跳到代码

import " ./styles.css " ; import { useState , useEffect } from " react " ; export default function App () { const [ stopWatch , setStopwatch ] = useState ( 30 ); const [ intervalId , setIntervalId ] = useState ( 0 ); useEffect (() => { let id = setInterval (() => setStopwatch (( p : number ) => p - 1 ), 1000 ); setIntervalId ( id ); return () => { clearInterval ( intervalId ); }; }, []); useEffect (() => { if ( stopWatch === 0 ) { clearInterval ( intervalId ); } }, [ stopWatch ]); return < div className = " App " > { stopWatch } < /div> ; }

您可以尝试在此处运行此代码

让我们再次分解所有发生的事情：

  1. 组件模拟卸载并清除创建的间隔。
  2. 现在这个间隔将正常工作，我们看不到任何问题。

你看到了吗？ 运行它两次实际上可以帮助我们发现潜在的内存泄漏，否则我们可能会错过，目前这只是在开发中，无论如何它不会在生产中发生。 所以我认为这根本不是一个坏交易。

是这样吗？

它是运行两次以指出内存泄漏还是还有其他事情？

好吧，React 18 有一些有趣的东西要在未来推出，这个模拟重新安装组件的功能只是为此做准备。 让我们稍微研究一下

假设您在两个组件之间来回切换。 一些喜欢的东西：

  1. 打开组件 A 并做一些事情。
  2. 切换到组件 B
  3. 切换回组件 A

现在你会失去你在 A 中的状态（是的，有办法手动缓存它，但我们只讨论普通反应的潜力，没有任何技巧。）即，如果你正在填写表格或处理某些事情，你的进度就会丢失. 如果该页面发出一些缓慢的网络请求来呈现数据，那么它又将需要时间。

现在这个问题可以通过在内存中缓存 DOM 树来解决，当它重新挂载时，再次使用缓存的树以尽可能快地渲染。 这已经在 Vue 等框架中实现。 在那里，他们称之为 keepAlive 可以在这里阅读更多相关信息。 我强调继续此链接并检查演示它是如何工作的，以便您更好地了解它。

现在这里有一个警告。 根据用户的说法，他们已经重新打开了组件，因此他们应该看到一些应该在重新安装时发生的操作，并且在这里反应团队计划模拟重新安装。

现在，如果您考虑一下。 这很有意义，对吧？ 但是为什么要在开发模式下运行两次，只是为了在遇到奇怪的事情之前保持理智。

只是在一次谈话中提到 Dan 提到这将是一个选择加入功能，即您可以选择加入它，它不会发生，而是默认设置。

将来，将有可选功能让您执行此操作。 对于这些功能（如 Vue 中的 KeepAlive），您会*希望*效果在生产中重新运行。

谨防

随着围绕解决 useEffect 问题的一种特定方式的所有激烈对话，它有点名气，但实际上是一个问题。 让我们看看它是什么以及为什么我说的有点问题。

我们也可以用这种方式解决上面讨论的问题。

 import " ./styles.css " ; import { useState , useEffect , useRef } from " react " ; export default function App () { const [ stopWatch , setStopwatch ] = useState ( 30 ); const [ intervalId , setIntervalId ] = useState ( 0 ); const isInitialRender = useRef ( true ); useEffect (() => { let id ; if ( isInitialRender . current === true ) { isInitialRender . current = false ; id = setInterval (() => setStopwatch (( p ) => p - 1 ), 1000 ); setIntervalId ( id ); } }, []); useEffect (() => { if ( stopWatch === 0 ) { clearInterval ( intervalId ); } }, [ stopWatch ]); return < div className = " App " > { stopWatch } < /div> ;

您可以尝试在此处运行此代码

它解决了问题吗？ 是的，但它真的解决了问题吗？ 不。

我认为这段代码是多维度的问题，让我们讨论一下。

  1. 首先在不需要的地方使用钩子。 任何案例都可以以产生正确效果的方式编写或重写，如果可能，则无需这样做。

  2. 这种重新安装组件的模拟在生产中不存在，所以我们绝对不需要任何额外的开销来在生产中运行。

  3. 为什么要逆流而上？ 试想一下，在添加这个模拟重新安装的功能之前，已经进行了数周的辩论，他们会创建 POC 等等。 经过大量努力，他们提出了一个功能，该功能迫使开发人员编写高质量的代码，然后有人通过使用此类技术将其变为无效。 最好是测试代码并以更简洁的方式编写代码，然后等待一个错误然后解决它（没有人真的想要周五晚上的 SEV 1 门票）。 对不起，如果我听起来有点咆哮。

结论

故事的关键是在开发模式下模拟重新安装实际上是有帮助的。 如果某些逻辑因此而中断，那么肯定有不同或更好的方法来实现相同的功能。 最后但并非最不重要的一点是，React 将在不久的将来推出更多令人兴奋的功能。

你还有一些问题吗？ 在下面的评论中发布它们，我会尽力帮助你。 感谢您成为如此耐心的读者，下次见。



原文:

In this article we are going to discuss why on earth useEffect is running twice in React18. Is it breaking your code or can it break your code and what to do if it breaks your code. How is it helping, if it is and what is the way ahead.

So you might have heard of it already as it is hottest gossip these days in the react universe that useEffects will now run twice in Strict mode while development. To be very specific react will simulate unmounting and remounting, i.e. previously what looked like this

* React mounts the component.
  * Layout effects are created.
  * Effects are created.

will now look like this.

* React mounts the component.
  * Layout effects are created.
  * Effects are created.
* React simulates unmounting the component.
  * Layout effects are destroyed.
  * Effects are destroyed.
* React simulates mounting the component with the previous state.
  * Layout effects are created.
  * Effects are created.

Hearing this most of us start rolling our eyes as it is not at all intuitive to anybody who is familiar to react. It literally got so controversial that Dan tweeted this at a point.

@jody_lecompte @Dayhaysoos honestly on emotional level i am pretty tired of explaining something that applies to all frameworks, and people turning it into some kind of React panic :(

So lets see some piece of code which broke due to this behavior of useEffect.

Cation: The code you are about to see is just for demonstration purpose only, motive here is to write simple explanatory piece of code that points to the main discussion.

import "./styles.css";
import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; export default function App() { const [stopWatch, setStopwatch] = useState(30); const [intervalId, setIntervalId] = useState(0); useEffect(() => { let id = setInterval(() => setStopwatch((p) => p - 1), 1000); setIntervalId(id); }, []); useEffect(() => { if (stopWatch === 0) { clearInterval(intervalId); } }, [stopWatch]); return <div className="App">{stopWatch}</div>;
}

so this is just a simple snippet which is trying to start a reverse counter and count till 0. In react 17 it would have worked just fine but check it out here this counter won't stop.

So lets try to determine what went wrong. I'll break it into steps

  1. useEffect ran and registered an interval that will update the state every second.
  2. Component simulated unmounting.
  3. useEffect ran and registered one more an interval that will update the state every second.
  4. Now 2 interval are updating count at the same time.
  5. When interval is cleared only one of them is cleared which is why it keeps going on and on.

By now you might have already figured it out this is a typical case of memory leak and we can easily fix it using a cleanup function. Lets hop to the code

import "./styles.css";
import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; export default function App() { const [stopWatch, setStopwatch] = useState(30); const [intervalId, setIntervalId] = useState(0); useEffect(() => { let id = setInterval(() => setStopwatch((p: number) => p - 1), 1000); setIntervalId(id); return () => { clearInterval(intervalId); }; }, []); useEffect(() => { if (stopWatch === 0) { clearInterval(intervalId); } }, [stopWatch]); return <div className="App">{stopWatch}</div>;
}

you can try to run this code here

let's again break it down what all happened:

  1. useEffect ran and registered an interval that will update the state every second.
  2. Component simulated unmounting and cleared the created interval.
  3. useEffect ran and registered one more an interval that will update the state every second.
  4. Now this interval will work as it should and we see no issues.

Did you see that? Running it twice is actually helping us to find potential memory leaks which we may miss otherwise and currently this is only in development and it won't happen in production anyways. So I don't think it's a bad deal at all.

So is that it?

Is it running twice to point memory leaks or is there some thing else as well?

Well React 18 has interesting things to be rolled out in future and this feature of simulating remounting of an component is just a preparation for the same. Let's look into it a little

Say you switch back and forth between two components. Some what like:

  1. Opens up component A and do something.
  2. Switch to component B
  3. Switch back to component A

Now you would have lost your state in A (yes, there can be way to manually cache it but lets only talk about potential of plain react without any trickery.) i.e. if you were filling a form or working on some thing your progress is lost. If that page makes some slow network request to render data it will again take time.

Now this problem can be resolved by caching DOM tree in memory and when it is remounted using the cached tree again to render as quick as possible. This is already implemented in frameworks like Vue. There, they call it keepAlive can read more about it here. I emphasize go on to this link and check the demo how it works so you get a better idea of it.

Now there is one caveat here. According to user they have reopened the component and so they should see some actions which should happen at remounting and here react team plans to simulate remounting.

Now if you think about it. It makes a lot of sense right? But then why to run it twice on development mode, simply to have the sanity before you run into something weird.

Just to mention in a conversation Dan mentioned that this will be an opt-in feature i.e. you can opt into it it will not happen but default.

@DavidKPiano @tannerlinsley There are no production features today which would cause [] effects to re-run on top of existing state/DOM. In the future, there will be opt-in features that let you do this. For those features (like KeepAlive in Vue), you would *want* effects to re-run in production.

Beware

With all the heated up conversations going around one particular way of solving the issue of useEffect got a bit fame but is actually a problem. Let's see what it is and why I say is a bit problematic.

We could have solved the problem discussed above in this way as well.

import "./styles.css";
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react"; export default function App() { const [stopWatch, setStopwatch] = useState(30); const [intervalId, setIntervalId] = useState(0); const isInitialRender = useRef(true); useEffect(() => { let id; if (isInitialRender.current === true) { isInitialRender.current = false; id = setInterval(() => setStopwatch((p) => p - 1), 1000); setIntervalId(id); } }, []); useEffect(() => { if (stopWatch === 0) { clearInterval(intervalId); } }, [stopWatch]); return <div className="App">{stopWatch}</div>;

You can try running this code here

Did it solved the problem? Yes, but did it actually solved the problem? No.

I see this code as problem in multiple dimensions, let's discuss about it.

  1. First things first using a hook where it is not needed. Any case can be written or re-written in a way that it will produce the right effect and if that is possible then there is no need to do this.

  2. This simulation of remounting of component is not there in production, so we definitely do not need any added over head to run in production.

  3. Why to swim against the flow? Just Imagine there would have been debates conducted for weeks before adding this feature of simulating remounting, they would have created POCs and what not. After a lot of effort they come up with a feature which is forcing devs to write good quality code and then someone turns that to void by using such techniques. Its better to test code and write it in cleaner way then to wait for a bug and then resolve it (no one really wants a SEV 1 ticket on a Friday night right). Sorry if I sounded like ranting a bit.

Conclusion

Crux of the story is simulating remounting in development mode is actually helping in ways. If some logic is breaking due to that, there must be definitely a different or better way to achieve the same functionality. Last but not the least, React has much more exciting features to come in near future.

Are you still left with some questions? Post them in comment below I'll try to help you out. Thank you for being such a patient reader and see you next time.
item.author: sjtgshivam

item.title: 使用 Reactjs、Material-UI 和 Swiperjs 构建类似 Instagram 的轮播明信片 | Build a carousel postcard like Instagram with Reactjs, Material-UI, and Swiperjs
item.description:
安詹·肖莫德

发表于您可以从这里演示网站

视频教程

我已经在我的 youtube 频道上制作了一个关于它的视频。 查看更多详细信息。

笔记：

该应用程序是使用 Material-UI V4 构建的。 当前版本是 5。但不要担心。 您仍然可以使用该代码。 您只需要更改组件的导入路径。 其他一切都将是一样的。 查看他们的文档以获取更多详细信息。

从头开始设置

创建一个 create-react-app

 npx create-react-app <app> cd <app>

安装包

yarn add @material-ui/core @material-ui/icons swiper

从最小设置开始

git clone git@github.com:thatanjan/insta-carousel-yt.git cd insta-carousel-yt git fetch git checkout scratch

创建应用程序的容器和标题

// App.js import Grid from ' @material-ui/core/Grid ' import Typography from ' @material-ui/core/Typography ' import PostCard from ' ./PostCard ' function App () { return ( < div className = ' App ' > < Grid container > < Grid iem xs = { 12 } style = {{ height : ' 25vh ' , display : ' grid ' , placeItems : ' center ' }} > < Typography variant = ' h3 ' > Insta Carousel < /Typography > < /Grid > < Grid item container xs = { 12 } justifyContent = ' center ' > < Grid item xs = { 3 } > < PostCard /> { ' ' } < /Grid > < /Grid > < /Grid > < /div > ) } export default App

解释：

  • 创建了一个将居中的标题。
  • 制作了一个包含明信片的容器，它将占用 12 个网格中的 3 个网格空间。如果您不了解 Material UI 网格，您可以观看以下视频。
 import React from ' react ' import { Swiper , SwiperSlide } from ' swiper/react ' import { makeStyles } from ' @material-ui/core/styles ' import Card from ' @material-ui/core/Card ' import CardHeader from ' @material-ui/core/CardHeader ' import CardMedia from ' @material-ui/core/CardMedia ' import CardContent from ' @material-ui/core/CardContent ' import CardActions from ' @material-ui/core/CardActions ' import Avatar from ' @material-ui/core/Avatar ' import IconButton from ' @material-ui/core/IconButton ' import Typography from ' @material-ui/core/Typography ' import FavoriteIcon from ' @material-ui/icons/Favorite ' import ShareIcon from ' @material-ui/icons/Share ' import MoreVertIcon from ' @material-ui/icons/MoreVert ' import CommentIcon from ' @material-ui/icons/Comment ' import SwiperCore , { Keyboard , Scrollbar , Pagination , Navigation , } from ' swiper/core ' import ' swiper/swiper.min.css ' import ' swiper/components/pagination/pagination.min.css ' import ' swiper/components/navigation/navigation.min.css ' import ' swiper/components/scrollbar/scrollbar.min.css ' import avatarImage from ' ./media/postAvatar.jpg ' import ts_1 from ' ./media/carousels/ts_1.jpg ' import ts_2 from ' ./media/carousels/ts_2.jpg ' import ts_3 from ' ./media/carousels/ts_3.jpg ' import ts_4 from ' ./media/carousels/ts_4.jpg ' import ts_5 from ' ./media/carousels/ts_5.jpg ' const useStyles = akeStyles ({ media : { height : 0 , paddingTop : ' 100% ' , }, swiperContainer : { paddingBottom : ' 3rem ' , ' & .swiper-pagination-bullet ' : { background : ' blue ' , }, ' & .swiper-button-next:after ' : { fontSize : ' 2rem !important ' , }, ' & .swiper-button-prev:after ' : { fontSize : ' 2rem !important ' , }, }, }) SwiperCore . use ([ Keyboard , Scrollbar , Pagination , Navigation ]) const images = [ ts_1 , ts_2 , ts_3 , ts_4 , ts_5 ] const PostCard = () => { const { media , swiperContainer } = useStyles () return ( < Card > < CardHeader avatar = { < Avatar src = { avatarImage } /> } title = ' Just a Carousel ' subheader = { new Date (). toDateString ()} action = { < IconButton > < MoreVertIcon /> < /IconButton > } / > < Swiper grabCursor keyboard = {{ enabled : true }} pagination = {{ clickable : true }} navigation loop className = { swiperContainer } > { images . map (( image , index ) => ( < SwiperSlide key = { index } > < CardMedia className = { media } image = { image } / > < /SwiperSlide > ))} < /Swiper > < CardActions disableSpacing > < IconButton > < FavoriteIcon /> < /IconButton > < IconButton > < CommentIcon /> < /IconButton > < IconButton > < ShareIcon /> < /IconButton > < /CardActions > < CardContent > < Typography variant = ' body2 ' color = ' textSecondary ' component = ' p ' > Adipisicing eaque temporibus elit incidunt obcaecati . Aut eum excepturi id aut consequatur ex ? Incidunt debitis at consequuntur accusamus rerum Tempora veritatis maiores quam molestias aut placeat qui . Iure neque libero voluptas aliquid ! < /Typography > < /CardContent > < /Card > ) } export default PostCard

解释：

  • 我们使用了 Material UI 中的 card、cardHeader 和其他组件。
  • 它有一点自定义样式，因此它可以在每个屏幕尺寸上保持响应，并且始终保持纵横比。
  • 我们从 Swiperjs 导入了Keyboard, Scrollbar, Pagination, Navigation模块。 要有导航，用键盘导航等等。
  • 我们在Swiper组件中添加了自定义样式来修改Swiper组件的图标。

项目已经准备就绪。 请观看视频了解更多详情。

不可用mako - May 8 5月8日



原文:

Anjan Shomodder

Posted on May 22

You can demo the website from here

Video Tutorial

I have already made a video about it on my youtube channel. Check that out for more details.

Note:

The application is built with Material-UI V4. The current version is 5. But don't worry. You can still use the code. You only need to change the import paths of components. Everything else will be the same. Check their docs for more details.

Setup from scratch

Create a create-react-app 

npx create-react-app <app>
cd <app>

Install packages 

yarn add @material-ui/core @material-ui/icons swiper

Start from minimal setup 

git clone git@github.com:thatanjan/insta-carousel-yt.git
cd insta-carousel-yt
git fetch
git checkout scratch

Create the container and title of the application 

// App.js
import Grid from '@material-ui/core/Grid'
import Typography from '@material-ui/core/Typography' import PostCard from './PostCard' function App() { return ( <div className='App'> <Grid container> <Grid iem xs={12} style={{ height: '25vh', display: 'grid', placeItems: 'center' }} > <Typography variant='h3'>Insta Carousel</Typography>
 </Grid>
 <Grid item container xs={12} justifyContent='center'> <Grid item xs={3}> <PostCard />{' '} </Grid>
 </Grid>
 </Grid>
 </div>
 )
} export default App

Explanation:

  • Created a title that will be centered.
  • Made a container containing the post card which will take 3grid space out of 12. If you don't about the Material UI grid you can the following video.
import React from 'react'
import { Swiper, SwiperSlide } from 'swiper/react'
import { makeStyles } from '@material-ui/core/styles'
import Card from '@material-ui/core/Card'
import CardHeader from '@material-ui/core/CardHeader'
import CardMedia from '@material-ui/core/CardMedia'
import CardContent from '@material-ui/core/CardContent'
import CardActions from '@material-ui/core/CardActions'
import Avatar from '@material-ui/core/Avatar'
import IconButton from '@material-ui/core/IconButton'
import Typography from '@material-ui/core/Typography'
import FavoriteIcon from '@material-ui/icons/Favorite'
import ShareIcon from '@material-ui/icons/Share'
import MoreVertIcon from '@material-ui/icons/MoreVert'
import CommentIcon from '@material-ui/icons/Comment' import SwiperCore, { Keyboard, Scrollbar, Pagination, Navigation,
} from 'swiper/core' import 'swiper/swiper.min.css'
import 'swiper/components/pagination/pagination.min.css'
import 'swiper/components/navigation/navigation.min.css'
import 'swiper/components/scrollbar/scrollbar.min.css' import avatarImage from './media/postAvatar.jpg'
import ts_1 from './media/carousels/ts_1.jpg'
import ts_2 from './media/carousels/ts_2.jpg'
import ts_3 from './media/carousels/ts_3.jpg'
import ts_4 from './media/carousels/ts_4.jpg'
import ts_5 from './media/carousels/ts_5.jpg' const useStyles = akeStyles({ media: { height: 0, paddingTop: '100%', }, swiperContainer: { paddingBottom: '3rem', '& .swiper-pagination-bullet': { background: 'blue', }, '& .swiper-button-next:after': { fontSize: '2rem !important', }, '& .swiper-button-prev:after': { fontSize: '2rem !important', }, },
}) SwiperCore.use([Keyboard, Scrollbar, Pagination, Navigation]) const images = [ts_1, ts_2, ts_3, ts_4, ts_5] const PostCard = () => { const { media, swiperContainer } = useStyles() return ( <Card> <CardHeader avatar={<Avatar src={avatarImage} />}
 title='Just a Carousel' subheader={new Date().toDateString()} action={ <IconButton> <MoreVertIcon /> </IconButton>
 } />
 <Swiper grabCursor keyboard={{ enabled: true }} pagination={{ clickable: true }} navigation loop className={swiperContainer} > {images.map((image, index) => ( <SwiperSlide key={index}> <CardMedia className={media} image={image} />
 </SwiperSlide>
 ))} </Swiper>
 <CardActions disableSpacing> <IconButton> <FavoriteIcon /> </IconButton>
 <IconButton> <CommentIcon /> </IconButton>
 <IconButton> <ShareIcon /> </IconButton>
 </CardActions>
 <CardContent> <Typography variant='body2' color='textSecondary' component='p'> Adipisicing eaque temporibus elit incidunt obcaecati. Aut eum excepturi id aut consequatur ex? Incidunt debitis at consequuntur accusamus rerum Tempora veritatis maiores quam molestias aut placeat qui. Iure neque libero voluptas aliquid! </Typography>
 </CardContent>
 </Card>
 )
} export default PostCard

Explaination:

  • We have used card, cardHeader, and other components from Material UI.
  • CardMedia component will have our image. It has a little bit of custom style so that it stays responsive on every screen size and it will always maintain the aspect ratio.
  • We have imported Keyboard, Scrollbar, Pagination, Navigation modules from Swiperjs. To have navigation, navigation with keyboard and so on.
  • We added custom styles to the Swiper component to modify the icons of Swiper component.

And the project is ready. Please watch the video for more details.

notsoavailablemako - May 8
item.author: thatanjan
